name: io.github.davidmosiah/short-video-agent-kit
title: Short Video Agent Kit
description: Provider-neutral short-form AI video toolkit for agents. Builds dry-run payloads and optional live vertical video generation flows for Sora/OpenAI, Gemini Veo, xAI/Grok and Seedance-style providers.

environmentVariables.name: SHORT_VIDEO_DRY_RUN
environmentVariables.description: Set to false only when the agent should call paid video providers. Defaults to dry-run behavior.

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional API key for OpenAI/Sora provider calls.

environmentVariables.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional API key for Gemini Veo provider calls.

environmentVariables.name: XAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional API key for xAI/Grok provider calls.
